response.justification: Maria Rodriguez is a full-stack web and backend software developer with 14+ years of experience in web platforms, mobile, and distributed systems, but has no demonstrated experience in the core competencies required for this role: SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, deep learning workload analysis, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD architectures, or hardware-software co-design. The role demands a principal-level engineer specializing in computer architecture and AI hardware performance, which is an entirely different discipline from the candidate's background.
strengths: 14+ years of progressive software engineering experience, meeting the Bachelor's + 8 years experience threshold
Demonstrated performance engineering awareness in high-throughput distributed systems (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Some exposure to embedded systems and hardware-adjacent work (robotic arms, wave field synthesis for thesis)
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or hardware performance simulation — the core technical requirements of the role
No background in AI/deep learning workloads, neural network training or inference optimization, or AI accelerator design
Skill set is entirely web/backend (TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, React); no indication of C/C++ systems-level or hardware co-design work beyond minor historical mentions

key_factors.factor: No SoC/IP or GPU architecture experience
Long career with performance-conscious systems work
